name: calendar-demo
visual_summary: The Calendar Demo component is a date picker UI element that allows users to select dates from a visual calendar. It appears as a box with a list of month and year buttons, and a table displaying the days of the month. A developer would use this component for a registration or booking form where users need to choose dates.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready date picker component with the following characteristics:

Name: calendar-demo
Description: The Calendar Demo component is a date picker UI element that allows users to select dates from a visual calendar. It appears as a box with a list of month and year buttons, and a table displaying the days of the month. A developer would use this component for a registration or booking form where users need to choose dates.
Style: material, light
Interactions: static, readonly
Tags: date picker, calendar, datepicker

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
